plan_section: Final review: Steps 1-7 utilities submodule integration

plan_alignment.notes: The implementation matches the master plan: pinned submodule, generated local artifacts as the runtime boundary, canonical /tools routes, known-path redirects, serial safety hardening, UI polish, CI stale checks, and Dependabot submodule PR automation.

correctness_safety.notes: No release-blocking correctness or safety issues found. Serial generated actions and settings apply flows remain confirmation-gated, private/secret/password writes are blocked in generated/profile/settings paths, unsupported browser states are prominent, and Apply is disabled unless connected with a valid plan.

code_quality.notes: The integration is cleanly layered around small scripts, typed generated exports, local adapters, and existing component patterns. No unnecessary Flask/proxy/iframe/runtime coupling was introduced.

completeness.notes: Step acceptance criteria are satisfied and step reviews are all approved. Reported final gates cover submodule checks, generation/staleness, lint, typecheck, unit tests, production build, targeted e2e, a11y, Docker build, and Docker runtime smoke.

patterns.notes: Runtime source consumes @/lib/upstream-utilities generated artifacts rather than vendor imports. The submodule remains read-only source material, and compatibility redirects are limited to known public utility page paths.

integration.notes: CI checkout is recursive, utilities:check runs after submodule validation, Dependabot is narrowly scoped to gitsubmodule updates with no auto-merge, and Docker/runtime behavior remains independent of vendor contents.

flags.note: Serial profile validation is intentionally narrower than the upstream schema and will fail stale checks if upstream starts using schema-valid command steps or omitted send step types; that is acceptable but future submodule PRs may need adapter updates.
Airport region support now follows generated upstream airport data directly, so future upstream additions will expand local supported regions during a reviewed generated-artifact update.
